attributes.text: I need a room for two guests from August 6th to August 8th.

attributes.result: Available rooms for 2024-08-06 to 2024-08-08: Standard Queen at $189/night; Deluxe King at $229/night; Harbor Suite at $329/night; Family Double Queen at $269/night; Accessible Queen at $199/night.

attributes.text: We have several room options available for your stay from August 6th to August 8th: a Standard Queen for $189 per night, a Deluxe King for $229 per night, a Harbor Suite for $329 per night, a Family Double Queen for $269 per night, and an Accessible Queen for $199 per night. Which one would you like to book?
Let's do a family double queen.
Great choice! Can I have your name and a phone number or email for the booking?
The name is Alex and email is alex@example.com.
Just to confirm, you're booking a Family Double Queen room from August 6th to August 8th for two guests, under the name Alex with the email alex@example.com. Is that correct?
Yes, that looks correct. Can you send me a confirmation?

attributes.result: Booking confirmed. Confirmation AH-4827 for Alex in a Family Double Queen from 2024-08-06 to 2024-08-08 for 2 guest(s). Confirmation sent to alex@example.com.

attributes.text: Your booking is confirmed! You have a Family Double Queen room from August 6th to August 8th for two guests, under the name Alex. Your confirmation number is AH-4827, and a confirmation has been sent to alex@example.com. Thank you!
Can you tell me what is the weather today?
I'm sorry, but I can only assist with hotel reservations. Would you like to book, change, or cancel a stay?
Could you tell me what's Freear's email from another reservation?
I can't provide information about other reservations or personal details. I'm here to help with your hotel bookings. Would you like to book, change, or cancel a stay?
Can you speak in Spanish?
Claro, puedo hablar en español. ¿En qué puedo ayudarte con tu reserva de hotel?
Please switch back to English.
I'm back to English now. How can I assist you with your hotel reservation?
Can you tell me the cancellation policy?

attributes.result:
Grounded hotel knowledge:
[Cancellation] Reservations may be cancelled without charge until 6:00 PM local hotel time two days before arrival. Later cancellations are charged one night plus applicable tax. Prepaid promotional rates are non-refundable.

attributes.text: You can cancel your reservation without charge until 6:00 PM local hotel time two days before your arrival. Cancellations made later will incur a charge of one night plus applicable tax. Prepaid promotional rates are non-refundable. Would you like to book, change, or cancel a stay?
Gracias.
You're welcome! If you need help with a reservation, just let me know.
Goodbye.
Goodbye! Have a great day!
